Sridharacharya
(C.E. 1025) c
derived a formula, now known as the quadratic formula,
(as quoted by Bhaskara IH) for solving a quadratic equation by the method of completing
the
Arab mathematician Al-Khwarizmi
(about
C.E. 800)
square. An
also studied
quadratic equations of different t
types. Abraham
n bar

Ha-Nasi, in his book

published in E
Europe in C.E. 1145
gave complete solutions of
